ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Should the plugin attempt to create the daily note if it does not exist?
ast.target: 如果每日笔记不存在，插件是否应尝试创建它？

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Daily note currently does not exist and plugin settings are set to not create it.
ast.target: 每日笔记当前不存在，且插件设置为不创建它。

ast.name: text
ast.source: If there are certain days of the week you wish to skip creating a new note for, you can configure that here. The plugin will not attempt to automatically create new notes on those days.
ast.target: 如果您希望跳过一周中的某些天来创建新笔记，可以在此处配置。插件将不会在这些天尝试自动创建新笔记。
